_doc: Disk model database. `patterns` is an array of substring matches (case-insensitive) against smartctl model_name. First match wins. Fields: dram (Bool|null), nand (TLC|MLC|QLC|SLC|null), controller, tier (consumer|enterprise|prosumer|unknown), tbwPerTb (typical TBW per TB of capacity), plp (power-loss protection), formFactor. Add custom entries in ~/disk-reports/.config/models.json (same schema); user entries take precedence.

models._note: OEM client, often in HP/Dell/Lenovo laptops
